title: rosa tomentosa var. anthracitica
intro: Rosa tomentosa var. anthracitica, also known as the 'Black Rosa' or 'Black Rose', is a variant of the Rosa tomentosa species, a shrub native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa var. anthracitica are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support digestive health, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to create teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
